keywords: TEK screws price, self-drilling screws FOB China, hex washer head screws, metal roofing screws, steel frame fasteners

heading.en: Self-Drilling TEK Screws: Types and Applications

body.en: TEK screws/a> (self-drilling screws/a>) eliminate the need for pre-drilling in metal applications. The integrated drill point cuts through steel up to 12.5mm thick, saving installation time and costs. TEK 3 (No. 3 drill point): Drills through 1.2mm - 3.0mm steel TEK 4 (No. 4 drill point): Drills through 3.0mm - 6.0mm steel TEK 5 (No. 5 drill point): Drills through 4.0mm - 12.5mm steel TradeGo manufactures TEK screws/a> to DIN 7504 standard, with zinc plating or hot-dip galvanizing for corrosion resistance.
